description: Student profile teaser card displaying a thumbnail image, quote/title link, student name, course, and short description.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard student profile teaser with all fields

props.title: Freedom to choose my own projects and join different engineering teams has allowed me to shape my degree
props.studentCourse: MEng Mechanical Engineering with an industrial placement
props.description: Joel talks about his industrial placement experience and how his degree is preparing him to be an engineer

stories.name: WithLongTitle
stories.description: Teaser with a longer quote title

props.title: History has informed everything I do on a daily basis. It changes the way I view the news. It changes the way I analyse current events
props.description: Kat Cowan talks about her passion for history, and how it has led to a successful career in broadcast journalism.

stories.name: Group
stories.description: Multiple student profile teasers displayed in a grid

instances.imageAlt: Student Damian Shepherd in front of a blurred building
instances.title: The standard of teaching was impeccable and every tutor was invested in ensuring each student reached their full potential
instances.description: After graduating from our Journalism MA in 2020, Damian Shepherd has won several journalism awards for his deep investigative stories.

instances.imageAlt: An general engineering alumnus standing on the rail with his Network Rail uniform
instances.title: Seeing something I created being genuinely useful to the team has been extremely rewarding.
instances.description: Our General Engineering graduate, Fudail shares how a broad engineering foundation prepared him for the fast-paced career of rail infrastructure.

instances.imageAlt: Profile picture of MA student Ana Paula Biazon Rocha
instances.title: MA student Ana Paula Biazon Rocha on why she chose Sheffield
instances.description: Ana Paula Biazon Rocha is from Sao Paulo, Brazil and studying for her Masters in Applied Linguistics with TESOL.

notes:
The .teaser-thumb child is always present and wraps an img element — TeaserThumb atom is used as an intrinsic child. The .student-profile-name and .student-profile-course spans are siblings separated by a
tag. The description paragraph is present in all observed samples but modelled as optional for flexibility.
